name: American Airlines Group Inc.
business: American Airlines Group Inc. operates a major network air carrier providing scheduled air transportation for passengers and cargo. It serves over 350 destinations worldwide through its hubs and partner gateways. The company also operates a cargo division offering freight and mail services, and a loyalty program (AAdvantage) that generates significant revenue from co-branded credit card partnerships.

exposures.sentence: American and Alaska Airlines, in partnership with Breakthrough Energy Ventures and other one world carriers, led the launch of a new investment fund that seeks to accelerate the global development of long-term, lower emissions aviation fuel solutions designed to be cost effective and scalable.
American has invested in ZeroAvia to help advance the development of its hydrogen fuel cell-powered electric aircraft engines.
American is an investor in and customer of Vertical Aerospace, thereby supporting the development of an emissions-free electric vertical takeoff and landing aircraft for passenger transportation.
In 2025, we took delivery of 40 latest-generation aircraft, including 23 Boeing 737-8 MAX, 11 Boeing 787-9, five Airbus A321XLR and one Airbus A321neo.
Our operations and financial results are materially affected by the availability and price of aircraft fuel, which represents one of the largest single cost items in our business.

catalysts.event: Delivery of four used Bombardier CRJ900 aircraft
catalysts.sentence: In addition, we have committed to purchase four used Bombardier CRJ900 aircraft which are scheduled to be delivered in 2026.

catalysts.event: Launch of first trans-Atlantic Airbus A321XLR route from New York to Edinburgh
catalysts.sentence: We also announced over 20 new routes for customers to explore in 2026, including our first trans-Atlantic route to be flown by the Airbus A321XLR from New York to Edinburgh, Scotland.

catalysts.event: Expiration of FAA slot waivers at New York airports
catalysts.sentence: the FAA has issued slot waivers for New York City area airports as a result of operational challenges arising from ATC staffing shortages; those waivers are now set to expire in October 2026.

catalysts.event: Extension of Mastercard agreement to exclusive payment network for AAdvantage co-branded credit cards
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we extended our agreement with Mastercard pursuant to a new 10 year contract, under which Mastercard remains the exclusive payment network for our AAdvantage co branded credit cards.

catalysts.event: CMA accepted binding commitments closing investigation into transatlantic joint business
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, the CMA accepted binding commitments and closed the case.

catalysts.event: Citi becomes exclusive issuer of AAdvantage co-branded credit card portfolio
catalysts.sentence: Starting in 2026, Citibank N.A. (Citi) became the exclusive issuer of the AAdvantage co-branded credit card portfolio in the U.S.
